reviews.text: Terrible experience at the Harley Street Clinic. I went to this clinic almost 2 years ago because my physician had a time slot there to perform a routine procedure. Procedure went well and paid the bill before i left the clinic and was surprised to receive another invoice six months later that included some items I’ve paid already for. I asked to corrected invoice and never heard anything back until another six months later third party started chasing me  to pay for the invoice that still not corrected. It took me lots of chasing HCA to finally correct the due amount and pay. How was I surprised that HCA think that I owe them another 400 hundred for something two years ago that they even don’t prove for. I am a physician myself and I have never seen so unprofessional management, lack of integrity, quality and how poorly this clinic treat clients.

Unfortunately, there is no way to contact management regarding complaints. The email address provided is not working, the reception staff are uninformed, and the nurses have no idea how to file a complaint. Sadly, I believe management doesn't want to hear any suggestions or complaints.

Absolute shambles on every level.
1. in terms of patient admission, no one knows anything, the room that was supposed to be ready more an hour ago is not ready, no one is responsible and no one …

I think they must have fake reviews.! If i could give 0 Stars I would. My initial appointment was a consultation. The objective was a spot injection removal and a dry skin solution. After paying for 2 sessions my skin had not changed …

To Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to file a formal complaint regarding the misconduct of a nurse named Asnaria at Harley Clinic. On November 15, 2024, Nurse Asnaria, who is of Filipino nationality, displayed inappropriate behavior towards us. She raised her voice and shouted at us, which was both unprofessional and distressing. Additionally, she refused to transfer my mother from the imaging bed to her private bed, citing the presence of family members in the room.

It is important to highlight that my mother was under palliative care and in a fragile emotional and physical state. As a family, we were also in a deeply distressed state due to her condition. Nurse Asnaria showed no compassion for my mother’s fear of being alone, especially in a foreign country, nor did she consider her need for family support during such a critical time.

We have reported this incident to our embassy, who emphasized that any mistreatment of their citizens is a direct offense to them. We urge the clinic to ensure that patients and their families are treated with respect, empathy, and dignity.

Went for a foot intervention. Clinic was in a different place and all the space was makeshift. I was charged 3000GBP for a 20 min intervention. Immediately after there was excessive bleeding, presumably due to unsuccessful cauterizing.- 3 months later the intervention was unsuccessful. I strongly recommend against this practice.

Clinic is ok, but customer service is a joke. I've had my CT test few months ago, in total I spent hours talking to the stuff over the phone since then, just to get the images. I lost count how many times I contacted the clinic, spending at …

Went to have potentially cancerous mole taken out.  Told test back in 2 weeks.  4 weeks later - no results yet.  Phoned on 8 different days over  last 2 weeks to find out update.  On 3, no response. On another 3, took a message and said they would call back, yet didn't.  On another 2, received email (not call) to give update, second of which said I would receive update today with results.  Yet to speak to anyone other than the person who asks the phone despite requesting.  Paid £1500 for about 45 mins of their time.  Still don't have test results.  Disappointed in not the word...

This review if for a specific doctor rather than the hospital. I would not recommend Dr. Farida Bano. I couldn’t get a word in during the consultation to share my concerns and she would constantly interject. Extremely poor service, and was rushing through the appointment.

She was disorganised, didn’t have reports from my previous specialist so I couldn’t move forward with the initial consultation that I booked for.

However, she casually suggested I should do a Pap smear, where  I had to chase them numerous times to get my results and I was charged an additional  £668 through my insurance (on top of the £145 for the initial consultation). She should have let me know the costs in advance before moving forward with the treatment.

Terrible experience, had to ask to switch consultants so now have to start everything from scratch.

The clinical staff are good, but the administrative staff are useless.

The hospital owes me £3000 and despite being assured they would credit that …

It is such a shame to see how this clinic had been degrading over the last few years . Unfortunately, I have been dealing with this clinic for over 10 years and I have seen with my own eyes how good they were and how disappointing the …

81 Harley street a complete Shambles today - kept waiting over an hour for an appointment made this morning for MRI - lots of notices around about kindness care and compassion but none promoting competence - lots of repetitive form filling and shrugging shoulders - third rate experience

Absolute waste of time, was kept in for 3 days and simply had blood tests done. No conclusive evidence as to what was wrong. Staff forgot to attend to me didn’t eat for a day so ordered a Deliveroo. Absolute waste of time and one of the worst and clinics/hospitals I have experienced. On top of that my coat was stolen from the room and housekeeping can’t remember seeing a black coat. It was a designer coat but I appreciate my health is more important than a coat however it is extremely aggravating that you go to a hospital and are stolen from. If you do have to use this clinic please squeeze your things into the safe.
I went to Harley Street Clinic back in August 2019 (14/08/2019 to be exact) to get a cyst on my nose removed and ended up with a huge hole in my nose which has left a permanent scar. Big mistake.

Absolutely a disgrace. I got appointment since 05 Jan 2023. Never got any response for my blood tests’ result and not sure if I am got any issue with my health after almost 2 months, visiting the clinic at 78 Harley Street. Few weeks ago, …

Avoid at all costs. Unqualified staff unables to interpret their own test result. Trying to lure many customers for additional services. Unprofessional staff who try to shift the blame to you because you are not the doctor. Calls are always busy to take your personal detail. Scam.

I went to this clinic very excited and confident thus I wanted to spend as much as needed in order to treat my mild acne scars!

When I have arrived at the clinic I only had very few spots on my forehead and clear skin on the reast of the face and chest. The doctor prescribed me products such as antibiotics, ptd and glycolic peel.

The nurses are very inefficient!!! Apart from one girl which impressed me. I can't remember her name exactly, but she was new and looks Chinese and is around 35 years old. She was very friendly, efficient and she did an amazing job in terms of pad and glycolic peel.

Regarding the treatment overall.
The Ptd was good, glycolic okay and slightly helped my skin, the readness almost disappeared.
However, when I've stopped the antibiotics they have prescribed, my skin was all covered in spots, including my chest, I looked so read I wanted to cry. Never had that acne on my face before! Horrible!!!
Therefore, this suggests that the antibiotics quickly worked and cleared the acne not their treatment!!! As such, they stopped it just exactly a week before the antibiotic treatment ended so they can try to convince me to move on the next more expensive "lie" stage.

Easy to figure out! Therefore, that was my last treatment at the clinic! When I have talked to them about this they have ignored the problem (shocking) instead of helping me because I've paid so much money, they surprisingly only tried to convince me to buy another treatment.
So disappointing! They DON'T CARE about the costumer at all but the money!!

To conclude, I'm now clear thanks to my GP, who I thanks very much for putting the effort and 0 money spent!

DO NOT WAIST YOUR TIME AND MONEY AT HARLEY STREET CLINIC. THEY ARE NOT HONEST AND DO NOT CARE ABOUT YOU BUT MONEY!
I had an MRI appointment scheduled for 9.15 am at 87 Harley Street.  When I showed up on time, I was told that they had no appointment scheduled for me and sent me away.

I was given wrong diagnosis following a mistake by their laboratory
Did the test 4 times and always came back wrong due to the incompetence of the staff…
Lost 5 months of my life, had to undergo a lot of tests and expose to radiation just because of their mistakes …
The worst was their customer service and how they never cared for my complaints … they took months to give me any response and eventually they just stopped responding …

This clinic done a biggest miracle of medical a world. A well known Corrupt Political family get treated here and open heart surgery with 4 bypass operation let him up from the bed only after three days and he was able to eat, use stairs …

First time I've been here. Given completely useless information prior to visit. Sent to wrong place.

Staff so unhelpful. Made to wait - and missed later appointments. Terrible for a private hospital. Waste of money.

Take me back to the impeccable NHS Royal Marsden.
Waiting time 6 hours in total, for a procedure that should take a few minutes (plus 30 min for recovering). And this is private healthcare?! Disrespectful and unprofessional

My mum went to Harley Street in June for a procedure but unfortunately died whilst having the procedure, she was absolutely fine when she walked in, never thought for one minute I'd never see her or speak to her again, very upsetting, wish she'd never gone, maybe we will get to the bottom of what happened on that day.

Shambolic trying to book CT scan and had to wait 2 weeks before they "validated" my consultants form despite having chest pain
And when I arrived the receptionist was hopeless

Shame on Harley Street Clinic, its doctors, and staff for hiding Kulsoom Nawaz and giving her corrupt husband (ex PM of Pakistan) a cover and alibi to run away from justice. Almighty pound sterling is greater than honor and integrity for Harley .
My only experience was speaking to a very surly receptionist. Very much a "computer says no" approach. Made me feel most unwelcome
Total waist of time. left my details for them to contact me regarding a private appointment and never contacted me. must be earning to much.
I enquired about a Advanced health check for my mother. I emailed 4 times and called 9 times. They did not responded to any emails or pick up any calls. Terrible

Send me to the wrong address. When I finally found the right place, after several calls to the clinic, I had to wait for my appointment
Ended up having my appointment 45 minutes later than I was supposed to. Extremely Bad costumer service.
The service was awful. Just only one visit they sent 3 invoices. For biopsy and swab test they charged £2100. Overall very disappointed
Organisation is not good between the receptions and doctors. Extremely unclear telephone manners. Impossible to get a hold of anyone, always being transferred.
Treating the corrupt and making sure to siphoning all the ill gotten money which this family had gathered from the poor if the country. These corrupt should be tried in court.

Rooms are available for RENT; if you are a corrupt person and hiding from law and enforcement agencies in your country, here comes the Harley street clinic; they provide luxury rooms and you can fake any illness and this hospital will actually support you
The reception department in the clinic is very bad !! these two 🤵🏾‍♀️🤵🏽‍♂️ …
Really hard to contact them and then no response when you do.

They let me down this people
Not professional also the laser for my nails wasn’t work not at all
In the modern way bandit/gangster

Referred by my health care provider
No answer on their phones to book appointments
Disorganized, inefficient, uncoordinated. And goes without saying over priced.
The worst customer support ever! Won't recommend them to anyone.
Can someone guide me what medical problems does this clinic specialise in?
someone can post photos wife of corrupt nwazshref????
Shame on you to host fake people and hiding their propaganda.
Give your exact postal Address
known as hiding place for the corrupt politicians.
Treating the 1% only. The corrupts only.
Simply rubbish
Fake place for fake people....
Unprofessional staff.

Inpatient wards have nursing shortages, its worse than NHS care. 30minutes to respond to a patient. Oncology ward doesnt have specialist oncologist ward doctors who dont know what the yare doing. Ward doesn't have simple equipment in the rooms.
Complained to nurse manager, only had 'corporate speak' excuses and came back with no feedback. Profit maximising institution which puts money before patient care. DO NOT GO HERE

I was discharged from the hospital on the 25th March and I am still waiting for an itemised invoice.  I have tried several times to ring and I am left waiting for someone in accounts to answer the telephone.
There's a shortage of medical staff and poor service at the clinic. Everyone should avoid Arab doctors at the clinic. Refuse any doctor of Arab origin. This is advice from someone with experience.

Terrible admin, caused me lots of anxiety by cancelling appointment for a scan with 3 hours notice, when I had already travelled from Devon. They did manage to transfer me to another London hospital and paid for taxi, but have now asked for me to rebook, sent email looking for feedback and I  still haven't got result of scan, so a bit underwhelmed by my experience

This Clinic has no courtesy not only for its patients but even for its doctors. 15min is a max length of appointment. The doctor is never able to speak to a patient, have a look at medical results and record his/her observations at this …
Unfortunately this clinic offers a very standard level of care, with old facilities.  I would be seeking further treatments in a different facility and would not reccomend.
Untold invoice has been sent after paid £250 for 25mins consultation..
Dingy small place bored staff 3.30 hours not nice!
Impossible to book an appointment. Staff on the phone were unhelpful apart from one gent called Adam.
Worst organised private hospital I've ever been in.

Successful surgery which is the main thing, but they forgot to remove the nil by mouth sign from my door, meaning that having fasted the day before my surgery, I then wasn’t fed after my surgery, despite choosing my meal etc. when I was …

Not all smooth and professional.

Reception staff observed having argument within earshot of customers. …

Nursing staff, excellent, caring, attentive and kind.   Consultant also excellent.
Catering staff and housekeeping (cleaning) unfortunately the opposite to above although manager did visit me to discuss at end of my stay.
Biggest complaint was changing my room without any prior explanation or apology.   Cleaner came in at inappropriate times and expected me to move even though I was not well.  Catering staff did not communicate well and quite a few items on the menu were not available.    They did not offer to help serve the food, just "dumped and ran".    I was not told at the outside that tea and coffee was included but the nurses often asked if I wanted but each time I was worried I would be charged.   Poor communication at the outset as the printed material explains that charges will be made.
For the cost involved of the non clinical side (accommodation and "hotel" services aspect), sadly this was a poor experience for me.
Surgery successful, nurses and clinical staff excellent.   Let down by the non clinical side.

Had a smooth experience with the consultant doctors here but the receptionist put me off a little bit. They didn’t take the time to check my details and mistook me for another Asian patient very easily. When they realised the mistake they said “the patient got me confused so much” on the confirmation call back to their colleagues. Bruh I get it our names can be hard to catch but we are usually happy to repeat / spell them for ya and 30s of patience and respect is a lot more efficient than 10 minutes wait caused by negligence.

The clinicians, Doctors and Nurses are lovely. However there are challenges with joined up service, with different doctors saying different things, contradicting the doctor from the shift before and not necessarily knowing your medical …
Simply hopeless administration, but the care in the hospital was excellent.

Dear George Kuffourarmy, thank you for leaving a rating, we are sorry to see you did not have a good experience. Please do get in touch if you would like to raise any specific issues or concerns about your care with us. With our best wishes, The Harley Street Clinic

Dear Amanda Chitty, thank you for leaving a rating, we are sorry to see you did not have a good experience. Please do get in touch if you would like to raise any specific issues or concerns about your care with us. With our best wishes, The Harley Street Clinic, part of HCA Healthcare UK
